name: oolio-pm
description: Oolio Product Management. The full PM toolkit, signal to shipped: feedback intake into JPD, idea grooming to Oolio's standards, PRD writing and grilling, validation via the Virtual Product Council and its hospitality personas, Jira hygiene, Steering packs, the GTM suite, metrics review, discovery maps for themes too big for one session, and the research house: HubSpot/web/Apify signal synthesis, competitor dossiers, sweeps and battlecards, win/loss mining, one-off evidence attached as native JPD Insights, plus a compass that routes you to the right skill, drive, which turns a raw, rambling request into a finished result, and Roy the Behavioural Alchemist, the behavioural-economics lens that finds the value the spreadsheet cannot see. Twenty-seven skills.
